comments: EAA Checker specialises in streaming service compliance. Beyond standard WCAG 2.1 AA testing, it analyses HLS/DASH manifests, captions, audio description tracks, and video player accessibility against EN 301 549 Clause 7.
features: Free automated EAA compliance checker for streaming services. Tests against EN 301 549 Clause 7 (video/captions/audio description) and Clause 9 (WCAG 2.1 AA). HLS/DASH manifest analysis, player accessibility, PDF/VPAT export.
title: EAA Checker
